title: Euler vs Navier-Stokes Depth Comparison

analysis.object: T552: Euler vs Navier-Stokes Depth Comparison depth analysis

euler_blowup.description: Euler (inviscid) has known blow-up in 3D; no EML-2 damping term
euler_blowup.reason: Euler is EML-inf prone: no depth reducer; categorification unchecked

ns_viscosity.description: NS has viscosity nu*Laplacian(u); this is EML-3->EML-2 depth reducer
ns_viscosity.reason: Viscous term is explicit EML-3 to EML-2 depth reduction in PDE

depth_comparison.description: Euler >= EML-inf; NS may be EML-3 (regular) or EML-inf (blow-up) depending on Re
depth_comparison.reason: Viscosity shifts NS toward EML-3; but at high Re, EML-inf may still emerge

analysis.theorem: T552: Euler vs Navier-Stokes Depth Comparison (S831).

key_theorem: T552: Euler vs Navier-Stokes Depth Comparison (S831).
